evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);for(let i=0;i<2;i++){const ig=[...document.querySelectorAll('a,button')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS igual/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(ig){ig.click();await w(400);}}try{MOS.nav('zona')}catch(e){}await w(2500);const sel=document.getElementById('zonaSelector');const alm=[...sel.options].find(o=>/almac/i.test(o.textContent));if(alm){sel.value=alm.value;try{MOS.zonaCambiarZona(alm.value)}catch(e){}}await w(3500);try{MOS.abrirSorpresasPanel()}catch(e){return{err:String(e)}}await w(3000);const m=document.getElementById('modalSorpresas');return{open:m.classList.contains('open'),kpis:!!m.querySelector('.kpi'),reg:!!document.getElementById('sorpGuia')};})()
